sentences.english: Describe a restaurant you would recommend to a friend.
The restaurant I always recommend to friends is a small Italian place called Buono near Hongdae station.
sentences.korean: 항상 친구들에게 추천하는 식당은 홍대역 근처 부오노라는 작은 이탈리안 식당이에요.

sentences.english: The pasta is handmade fresh every day and the tomato sauce uses ingredients imported directly from Italy.
sentences.korean: 파스타가 매일 수제로 만들어지고 토마토 소스는 이탈리아에서 직접 수입한 재료를 사용해요.

sentences.english: What I love most is the cozy atmosphere — it feels like eating at a friend's home rather than a restaurant.
sentences.korean: 가장 좋아하는 것은 아늑한 분위기예요 — 식당보다 친구 집에서 먹는 것 같은 느낌이에요.

sentences.english: The prices are also very reasonable — a full meal costs around fifteen thousand won.
Every friend I've taken there has loved it and many have become regulars themselves.
sentences.korean: 데려간 모든 친구가 좋아했고 많은 친구가 직접 단골이 됐어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Long Commute vs. Small Apartment Near Work
